name: forge_bypasses
description: Cross-reference the substrate-bypass register (bypass-register.toml) against `// SUBSTRATE-BYPASS(<id>): <reason>` tags in source. Reports: bypasses declared in code without a register entry, register entries without code references, expired bypass deadlines. Use this to enforce that every genuine emergency bypass is heavyweight + visible + tracked toward decommission. Per `[[substrate-only-path]]`.

register.description: Path to the bypass-register.toml. Defaults to '<root>/bypass-register.toml'.

source_dir.description: Source tree to scan. Defaults to '<root>/crates'.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
